title: Buyer Rescue Workflow
problem: A buyer cannot access a purchased file or needs help after checkout. A normal AI response may be polite but incomplete; it may miss access-state classification, refund boundaries, escalation logic, or a public-safe proof note.
mission: Convert a recurring support scenario into a reusable GoalOS workflow: classify the issue, generate a safe response, flag human review when needed, preserve private buyer data off-chain, and produce a Proof Card showing what improved.
incremental: Establishes the first proof surface: AI work becomes an auditable workflow improvement rather than a disposable answer.
value: Faster support, clearer buyer experience, fewer repeated mistakes, and the first public demonstration that proof-backed workflow improvement can be understood by non-technical buyers.
plans: Buyer Rescue Workflow proof mission plan
rsi: The accepted artifact may influence future work only after evidence, evaluator review, reviewer validation, scope control, challenge window, rollback readiness, Selection Gate approval, and Chronicle entry.
